message:
test(config): add 31 unit tests for background types and ConfigContainer

Coverage expansion:
- config/background.rs: 0 → 27 tests (BackgroundSize, HorizontalAlignment,
  VerticalAlignment, BackgroundRepeat, BackgroundAttachment scroll_factor,
  BackgroundOrigin, SystemBackdrop, Interpolation, BlendMode,
  GradientOrientation, GradientPreset)
- config/meta.rs: 0 → 4 tests (ConfigContainer equality/clone, ConfigOption)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
